expectations.text: Runs idfa_audit.py and reports all four guardrails
expectations.evidence: Methodology: 'idfa_audit.py (IDFA Operations Skill v2.0)'. Four separate guardrail sections: G1 Named Range Priority, G2 LaTeX Verification, G3 Intent Notes, G4 Layer Isolation — all reported individually.

Guardrail 1 section: 'Named Range Priority — PASS. All 14 formulas in the Calculations sheet reference Named Ranges exclusively. Zero coordinate references detected. Coordinate references found: 0. Status: PASS.'

expectations.text: Reports Guardrail 3 status on Intent Notes
expectations.evidence: Guardrail 3 section: 'Intent Notes — PASS. All 14 formula cells have intent-note comments attached. Coverage is 100%. Formulas with comments: 14. Formulas missing comments: 0.'
Guardrail 4 section: 'Layer Isolation — PASS. No hardcoded numeric constants were found embedded in formulas. Hardcoded values in formulas: 0. Status: PASS.'
Overall Result table: 'Overall: PASS, Score: 100%, Total formulas audited: 14'. Also: 'IDFA compliance score: 100% — all four guardrails PASS'.

expectations.text: Explains what each guardrail protects against in business terms
expectations.evidence: G1: 'ensures formulas are self-documenting and resilient to structural changes'. G2: 'No complex multi-step financial formulas requiring independent mathematical verification'. G3: 'explaining the business intent of the calculation'. G4: 'All numeric inputs flow through the Assumptions layer via Named Ranges' — each has a business-level Explanation paragraph.
